name: kronael
description: Installer bridge for the Kronael Claude Code toolkit.

interface.shortDescription: Install the Kronael Claude Code toolkit from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Runs the canonical installer, deploys the Claude Code bundle into ~/.claude/, and exposes installed skills to Codex through ~/.agents/skills.
defaultPrompt: Use $kronael-install to bridge CLAUDE.md and .claude/skills into Codex.
